evidence_excerpt: Treatment with topical isotretinoin cleaned the lesions in 3 months, but they recurred when treatment ended. Therefore we initiated a maintenance dose applied twice weekly.

quality_of_life.evidence_excerpt: Lesions described as asymptomatic and chronic; no pruritus or pain reported.

timeline_events.evidence_excerpt: Treatment with topical isotretinoin cleaned the lesions in 3 months.
Therefore we initiated a maintenance dose applied twice weekly.

notes_on_uncertainty: Long-term follow-up duration after starting maintenance therapy is not provided. The statement that lesions are asymptomatic is presented in general disease context; patient-specific symptom details are not explicitly documented, but no symptoms were reported in the case narrative.
